revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Georgia (U.S. state)]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Georgia (U.S. state)]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

#redirect[[en:Template:Country data Georgia (U.S. state)]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Georgia (U.S. state)]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Georgia (U.S. state) | shortname alias = Georgia | flag alias = Flag of Georgia (U.S. state).svg | flag alias-1879 = Flag of the State of Georgia (1879–1902).svg | flag alias-1902 = Flag of the State of Georgia (1902–1906).svg | flag alias-1906 = Flag of the State of Georgia (1906–1920).svg | flag alias-1920 = Flag of the State of Georgia (1920–1956).svg | flag alias-1956 = Flag of the State of Georgia (1956–2001).svg | flag alias-2001 = Flag of the State of Georgia (2001–2003).svg | link alias-army = Georgia Army National Guard | link alias-air force = Georgia Air National Guard | link alias-naval = Georgia Naval Militia | link alias-navy = Georgia Naval Militia | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{For|the nation in Europe|Template:Country data Georgia (country)}} | var1 = 1879 | var2 = 1902 | var3 = 1906 | var4 = 1920 | var5 = 1956 | var6 = 2001 </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
